name: vmd
description: Open draft for a semantic visual document format.

scripts.check: npm run sync:core && node --check core/vmd-core.cjs && node --check extension/vmd-core.js && node --check extension/viewer.js && node --check extension/popup.js && node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/auto-render.js && node --check tools/render-html.mjs && node --check tools/sync-core.mjs && npm --prefix vscode-extension run check && npm run test:core && npm run render:sample
scripts.test:extensions: npm run test:chrome && npm run test:vscode
